question: Can RMB 100B over 3 years generate positive ROI, and what are the unit economics of self-operated brand building?

findings.claim: JD Retail's self-operated gross margin is approximately 14-19%, far below PDD's 56% marketplace gross margin — illustrating the structural margin cost of moving to self-operated
findings.data: JD consolidated gross margin TTM Q3 2025: 14.43%. JD Retail segment gross margin Q3 2025: 19.3% (13th consecutive quarter of YoY expansion). JD Retail operating margin: 5.9% (Q3 2025). Compare to PDD gross margin: 56.3% (FY2025). The 37-42 percentage point gross margin gap represents the structural cost of 1P vs 3P.

findings.claim: JD's 3P marketplace commission rates range from 0.6% to 8%, but the marketplace business is far more profitable per unit of revenue than 1P
findings.data: Standard 3P commission: 2-8% by category. JD reduced POP merchant commissions to 0.6% as a strategic move to grow marketplace. JD Marketplace and Marketing Revenue grew 24% YoY in Q3 2025. JD's 1P sales = 27% of total GMV; 3P = 73% of GMV — but 1P revenue dominates the P&L due to full revenue recognition.

findings.claim: JD's operating margin was negative 0.4% in Q3 2025 (consolidated) due to new business investments including food delivery — showing how self-operated expansions destroy margins
findings.data: Q3 2025 consolidated operating margin: -0.4% vs +4.6% in Q3 2024. The decline was attributed to food delivery (commission-free for merchants) and JD Logistics investments. JD Retail itself achieved 5.9% operating margin, but new ventures dragged the whole company negative.
